bitsandbytes_q4_q8.finding: bitsandbytes 4-bit quantization requires a CUDA GPU. On this CPU-only machine (torch 2.12.1+cpu, no usable CUDA) AirLLM's compression='4bit' fails during the layer-compression step with 'Torch not compiled with CUDA enabled'. Q4/Q8 are unavailable on this hardware; the experiment runs FP16 via AirLLM CPU sharding.
